name: Turkey Salad Topping
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces smoked turkey breast, cut into 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the mayonnaise, sour cream, lemon juice, salt, and pepper until smooth and creamy. Stir in the turkey, celery, apples, and chives; toss to coat thoroughly with dressing.
2. Cut the baked potatoes lengthwise, cutting almost to the base of the potato. Mash slightly with a fork, leaving the skins intact. Spoon the turkey mixture over each potato, dividing evenly. Sprinkle with pecans.
3. Makes 4 servings. Preparation time: 25 minutes.
Per serving: About 264 calories, 10 grams protein, 36 grams carbohydrates, 10 grams fat, 33% of calories from fat, 17 mg cholesterol, 638 mg sodium, 4 grams fiber.
